creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitter replied in private mail:

----- Forwarded message from Ralph Zitz <ralph@imada.sdu.dk> -----

From: Ralph Zitz <ralph@imada.sdu.dk>
Subject: Re: ports/127377: java/netbeans61 fails to make internetconnections
To: Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org>
Date: Thu, 5 Feb 2009 13:50:36 +0100 (CET)

Hi Stefan

At the moment I don't have a functional installation of FreeBSD, therefor
I cannot test if the issue has been resolved. I do believe however, that I
tried disabling ipv6 by means of the sysctl setting you mentioned. I don't
recall if compiling jdk16 without ipv6 support made a difference - I'm
sorry for the lack of information.

Regards,
Ralph Zitz.

----- End forwarded message -----
